caption: In a futuristic, metallic interior with white architectural elements and blurred figures in white uniforms in the background, two men stand side by side. The man on the left wears a grey, high-collared military-style uniform with shoulder pads and a matching peaked cap. The man on the right is dressed in a black, hooded garment with a glossy finish and wears dark-rimmed glasses. Across the sequence, the man in grey maintains a mostly steady posture, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he looks toward the man in black. The man in black is seen speaking, his mouth opening and closing in a conversational manner while he looks forward and slightly toward his companion. No text or logos are visible. The scene remains static in terms of camera position, with only minor movements in the subjects' facial expressions and lip movements.
